title: Cyclosorus ensifer
taxonomy: Cyclosorus ensifer is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This family is part of the larger order Polypodiales, which is a group of ferns that are generally known for having a two-lobed or deeply divided leaf. The Thelypteridaceae family is a subgroup of the larger division Polypodiophyta, which includes all types of ferns and their allies. This division is further categorized into the kingdom Plantae, which encompasses all plants. Overall, Cyclosorus ensifer is classified as a member of the plant kingdom.
uses: Cyclosorus ensifer is used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
